versions.title: Updates tab & release notes
changes: New Updates page in the top bar with full what's-new history
Sidebar update banner shows changelog bullets for the new version
Settings still has quick check-for-updates controls

versions.title: All accounts reconnect
changes: Every account reconnects in parallel after a drop (not one-at-a-time)
30-second watchdog schedules reconnect for any account still offline
Idling games resume automatically after reconnect

versions.title: Auto-reconnect & resume idling
changes: Steam auto-relogin when connection is lost
Fix relog delay for older configs (relogTimeout in seconds)
Resume active games after reconnect without restarting the app

versions.title: Smaller installer
changes: CI removes duplicate blockmap-only GitHub releases (updater fix)
Single background image file in the app package

versions.title: Multi-game & system tray
changes: Click games to add/remove multiple idle titles per account
Minimize and close hide to system tray; double-click tray to show
Quit from tray menu for a real exit

versions.title: UI & game selection
changes: Single-click game pick; fix last game sticking when switching
Scrollable accounts list in the sidebar
